nasb.text: But when the young man heard this statement, he went away grieving; for he was one who owned much property.

esv.text: When the young man heard this he went away sorrowful, for he had great possessions.

cnv.text: 那青年聽見這話，就憂憂愁愁地走了，原來他的財產很多。

ccb.text: 那青年听后，便忧伤地走了，因为他有许多产业。

csbs.text: 那年轻人听了这话，就忧忧愁愁地走开了，因为他有很多财产。
